text: Why is fishing the writer's favourite sport?
zh: 为什么钓鱼是作者最喜爱的运动？
钓鱼是我最喜欢的运动。

text: I often fish for hours without catching anything.
zh: 我常常一钓就是好几个小时，却什么也钓不到。

text: But this does not worry me.
they catch old boots and rubbish.
I never catch anything -- not even old boots.
zh: 我什么都钓不到——连旧靴子都钓不到。

text: After having spent whole mornings on the river,
zh: 在河边泡了一整个上午之后，

text: I always go home with an empty bag.
'You must give up fishing!' my friends say. 'It's a waste of time.'
zh: 朋友们对我说：“你该放弃钓鱼了！这简直是浪费时间。”

text: But they don't realize one important thing.
zh: 但他们没意识到重要的一点。

text: I'm not really interested in fishing.
zh: 我其实对钓鱼本身并不感兴趣。

text: I am only interested in sitting in a boat and doing nothing at all!
zh: 我感兴趣的只是坐在船上什么也不做！
